items.title: Just $5 today gets you this USB-C iPad stylus that looks like an Apple Pencil (70% off)
items.summary:
Apple Pencil alternative for iPad

Buy for $5 (Reg. $17)

Enter promo code YWTVFMKJ for $11 off.

What we love

It may not have all the bells and whistles of an Apple Pencil, but this affordable stylus nails the essentials. You still get handy features like palm rejection and USB-C charging, along with magnetic attachment support for select iPad Pro and iPad Air models. It even mimics the look and feel pretty well, all at a much lower price. If you’re trying out a stylus for the first time or just want a solid Apple Pencil alternative without spending big, this is about as budget-friendly as it gets.
